install_fields.label: Service Account Username
install_fields.description: Mixpanel Service Account Username. Created in Project Settings → Service Accounts.

install_fields.label: Service Account Secret
install_fields.description: Mixpanel Service Account Secret. Generated at service account creation — shown only once.

install_fields.label: Project ID
install_fields.description: Your Mixpanel Project ID. Found in Project Settings → Project ID.

install_fields.label: Region (US or EU)
install_fields.description: Data residency region. Use 'EU' for EU data residency projects. Defaults to 'US'.
